text: Science has a clearer story about multimedia learning than social media does. Multimedia learning combines text, images, and sounds. But how does it work? Studies show that our brains process visuals faster than text. This means more retention. In fact, combining these elements can boost learning by up to 60%. So, to learn effectively, mix visuals with audio. It’s simple but powerful. Curious for more learning tips? Follow for science-backed insights!
